page.title: Company policies
page.info: Policies are tenant-wide — they apply to every employee (e.g. 11h rest between shifts). For per-person or date exceptions, use Semantic rules. The AI auto-detects known patterns; if it can't, it proposes rewordings that can be applied.

enforcement.deterministicTooltip: Interpreter: {{interpreterId}}. The solver enforces it deterministically.
enforcement.llmRuntimeTooltip: LLM-runtime: the solver invokes the LLM on every evaluation to check this policy. Probabilistic enforcement (not deterministic).
enforcement.llmOnlyTooltip: No interpreter — only passed to the LLM prompt as context, no runtime enforcement.

dialog.descriptionNew: Policy applicable to the whole company, a branch, a department or a single employee. For natural-language one-off rules, use Semantic rules.
dialog.descriptionSuggestions: The system did not find a pattern that fits your text. The AI proposed these alternatives (each one verified). Pick one to create it, or close and rephrase freely.
dialog.descriptionCreated: Your policy was saved. Below we explain how it will be applied when generating schedules.

fields.textPlaceholder: e.g. Each employee rests at least 2 days per week, excluding holidays.
fields.severityHard: hard — the solver cannot violate it

errors.minLength: The text must have at least 10 characters.
errors.scopeMissingBranch: Pick the branch this applies to.
errors.scopeMissingDepartment: Pick the department this applies to.
errors.scopeMissingEmployee: Pick the employee this applies to.

actions.keepOriginalTooltip: Keep your wording as-is; the system will enforce it via LLM on each generation.

createdInfo.llmOnly: Saved as LLM-only. The solver does not enforce it deterministically; it only includes the text as context for the LLM during schedule generation. No hard guarantee.
createdInfo.llmRuntime: LLM-runtime enforcement: the solver invokes the LLM on every evaluation to check this policy. Probabilistic guarantee — on each verify-loop attempt the LLM decides if there's a violation. Adds extra token cost.
createdInfo.deterministic: Deterministic enforcement with interpreter {{interpreterId}}. The solver mathematically checks every proposal against the extracted parameters.
